query:
SELECT 'total' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM projects
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('status:', lifecycleStatus), COUNT(*) FROM projects GROUP BY lifecycleStatus
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('priority:', priority), COUNT(*) FROM projects GROUP BY priority
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('sector:', sector), COUNT(*) FROM projects GROUP BY sector
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('location:', SUBSTRING_INDEX(location, ',', -1)), COUNT(*) FROM projects GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(location, ',', -1)
ORDER BY cnt DESC
